name: Ansh Madaan
education: B.Tech in Computer Science, Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology (2023 - Present)

projects.name: Career Ops — AI-Powered Job Application Agent
projects.description: Built an end-to-end FastAPI job discovery platform that aggregates opportunities and uses Gemini and Pydantic for automated skill extraction and profile mapping.

projects.name: EEG-based Schizophrenia Detection using Deep Learning
projects.description: Designed a hybrid CNN-LSTM with attention achieving 97 percent accuracy on clinical EEG data, utilizing bandpass filtering and Grad-CAM for decision visualization.

projects.name: Voice Assisted Terminal
projects.description: Developed a voice-controlled terminal that translates natural language to shell commands using Google Generative AI, published and distributed via PyPI.

projects.name: Face Recognition-Based Chatbot Authentication System
projects.description: Engineered real-time facial recognition authentication using OpenCV integrated with a TensorFlow NLP chatbot and speech-to-text systems.
